title: Crosstalk Characterization: ZZ Coupling and Simultaneous Operations
description: Learn methods for detecting and quantifying crosstalk between qubits, including ZZ coupling measurement, simultaneous randomized benchmarking, and addressability characterization.
learningObjectives: Understand the physical sources of crosstalk in multi-qubit systems
Measure ZZ coupling strength between qubits
Use simultaneous RB to detect operational crosstalk
Characterize addressability and frequency crowding effects
